executable_code.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")
# Handle null strings or numeric 1
df['công_bố_mới'] = pd.to_numeric(df['công_bố_mới'], errors='coerce')
count = df[df['công_bố_mới'] == 1].shape[0]
print(count)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")
print(df.shape)
print(df['công_bố_mới'].unique())
count = df[pd.to_numeric(df['công_bố_mới'], errors='coerce') == 1].shape[0]
print(count)

```python
import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")
count = df[pd.to_numeric(df['công_bố_mới'], errors='coerce') == 1].shape[0]
print(json.dumps([[count]]))
```
